summary: Completed testing of Google Gemini AI integration for TradeLife. Found critical model naming issues that prevent AI functionality from working.

critical_bugs.issue: Incorrect model names used - 'gemini-3-flash' and 'gemini-3-pro' do not exist
critical_bugs.impact: Complete failure of AI functionality - all Gemini API calls return 404
critical_bugs.recommended_fix: Update GEMINI_FLASH to 'gemini-2.5-flash' and GEMINI_PRO to 'gemini-2.5-pro' or use preview versions: 'gemini-3-flash-preview' and 'gemini-3-pro-preview'

configuration_issues.issue: Free tier quota exceeded for some models (gemini-2.5-pro, gemini-2.0-flash)

passed_tests: API endpoint structure returns proper JSON format
Server Actions for AI are properly defined

success_percentage.backend: 75% - 3/4 tests passed (API integration fails due to model names)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All build and dependency tests passed
success_percentage.overall: 85% - Core functionality works, AI integration blocked by model naming
